message.content:
@startuml
title CVX-AI - Vue & Flask framework interaction
header VideoPlayer.vue (FileManager Component)

actor User
participant "Website" as Website #LightBlue
participant "Web Server" as WebServer #LightGreen
participant "Filesystem Server" as Fileserver #Orange
database "PC Filesyste m" as PCFS #Lavender

User -> Website : opens
activate Website
Website -> WebServer : initialize 
note right of Website: http://localhost:8080/
deactivate WebServer 

Website -> Fileserver : initialize  
note left of Fileserver: http://localhost:8090/
deactivate Fileserver  

Fileserver -> PCFS : read   
return default directory    
note over PCFS ... /CVX_AI_We bUI/root/api/data/"    

alt provide directories     
    return display Syncfusion FileManager component      
end alt     

@enduml
